mapper.sql: select alarm_id, sensor_type, channel_index, sensor_id, cycle_unit, alarm_frequency, attention_number, alarm_number, max_amplitude from alarm_partial_discharge

select a.device_sn,a.alarm_type,a.target_name,a.alarm_id, apd.sensor_type, apd.channel_index, apd.sensor_id, apd.cycle_unit, apd.alarm_frequency, apd.attention_number, apd.alarm_number, apd.max_amplitude,a.alarm_beginTime from alarm a left join alarm_partial_discharge apd on a.alarm_id = apd.alarm_id
mapper.insert:
insert into alarm_partial_discharge
alarm_id, sensor_type, channel_index, sensor_id, cycle_unit, alarm_frequency, attention_number, alarm_number, max_amplitude, pd_type,
#{alarmId}, #{sensorType}, #{channelIndex}, #{sensorId}, #{cycleUnit}, #{alarmFrequency}, #{attentionNumber}, #{alarmNumber}, #{maxAmplitude}, #{pdType},

insert into alarm_partial_discharge (alarm_id, sensor_type, channel_index, sensor_id, cycle_unit, alarm_frequency, attention_number, alarm_number, max_amplitude, pd_type) values
(#{item.alarmId}, #{item.sensorType}, #{item.channelIndex}, #{item.sensorId}, #{item.cycleUnit}, #{item.alarmFrequency}, #{item.attentionNumber}, #{item.alarmNumber}, #{item.maxAmplitude}, #{item.pdType})
mapper.delete:
update alarm_partial_discharge set del_flag=2 where alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
